properties.name: Our Lady of Keaau Youth Camp
properties.desc: National Guard and Honolulu Fire airlifted 72 children and adults from this spring break camp on Oahu's west coast.

properties.name: Waialua / Haleiwa Mass Rescue
properties.desc: Over 150 people rescued from rooftops and flooded homes as Kaukonahua Stream overflowed. Some pulled directly from rooftops.

properties.name: North Shore Campsite
properties.desc: A group of 70 people were surrounded by water at a campsite. Gov. Green: 'They were having difficulty getting out because there was so much water around them.'
